summary: Frontend testing of REEFSIDE Submarine Hub routing and all interactive zones. All new features working end-to-end.

issues: data-testid values differ from spec: guardian cards use 'guardian-option-scientist/ranger/fisher/advocate' (not 'guardian-card-*'), confirm button is 'closet-confirm-btn' (not 'confirm-loadout-btn') — tests should use actual testids

critical_code_review_comments: ESC key now properly closes HTP modal (fixed from iteration 2)
All 4 guardian options (scientist, ranger, fisher, advocate) visible and selectable in Equipment Bay
CONFIRM LOADOUT closes the closet panel correctly
Tutorial/Briefing panel opens with multi-page navigation (PREV/NEXT buttons, 6 pages)
Navigation panel shows all 7 levels (1-Shallow Reef through 7-The Deep Hunt)
Water Hatch interaction ([E] DIVE IN prompt) starts game correctly
Game canvas loads with SHALLOW REEF level, HUD, submarine entry animation working
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Submarine Hub features verified working: Title → BEGIN MISSION → SubmarineHub (hub-canvas) → E near closet = Equipment Bay with 4 guardians + confirm → E near briefing = Tutorial panel (6 pages) → E near navigator = Navigation panel (7 levels) → walk right to water hatch → [E] DIVE IN → GameCanvas renders. ESC closes HTP modal (was broken in iteration 2, now fixed). Actual data-testids: guardian-option-scientist/ranger/fisher/advocate, closet-confirm-btn, closet-close, tutorial-panel, tutorial-close, tutorial-prev-btn, tutorial-next-btn, navigation-panel, nav-close, level-option-0 through level-option-6, nav-confirm-btn.
